question: Chapters
feedback: Text does not list the main sections of the thesis. It only mentions that the introduction contains three parts (motivation, goals, and content description) but fails to name the actual thesis chapters (e.g., Literature Review, Methodology, Results, Conclusion).

question: Description
feedback: Text does not describe the contents of each section. It merely states that the introduction will contain a description of the thesis sections, but provides no actual summary or overview of what those sections cover.

question: Structure
feedback: Structure is unclear because the text describes the structure of the 'Introduction' section itself rather than the overall thesis structure. A reader cannot understand the general flow of the entire graduation thesis from this text.
